name: Rice Pilaf with Basil and Pine Nuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring broth to simmer in a small saucepan. Reduce heat to low and keep warm.
2. Heat oil in another heavy small saucepan over medium heat. Add onion and sauté until translucent, about 6 minutes.
3. Add rice and stir for 1 minute.
4. Add broth and bring to boil. Reduce heat to low.
5. Cover and cook until the broth is absorbed and rice is tender, about 20 minutes.
6. Stir basil and pine nuts into rice. Season with salt and pepper and serve hot.
